title: rubus calopetalus
intro: Rubus calopetalus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus calopetalus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Rubus calopetalus include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for therapeutic use.
